scripts.build:api: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/api && npx puppeteer browsers install chrome
scripts.build:telegram: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/telegram
scripts.build:discord: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/discord
scripts.build:whatsapp: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/whatsapp
scripts.build:instagram: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/instagram
scripts.build:messenger: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/messenger
scripts.build:apple: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/apple_business
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/api && npm run build -w packages/telegram && npm run build -w packages/discord && npm run build -w packages/whatsapp && npm run build -w packages/apple_business && npm run build -w packages/instagram && npm run build -w packages/messenger
